title: XPeng Q2 2025 Earnings Preview: Strong Delivery Momentum and Margin Expansion
text: XPeng (NYSE: XPEV) announced Q2 2025 results before market open on August 19, 2025. Analysts expected a loss of $0.11 per share, representing improvement from a $0.19 loss in Q2 2024, with revenue projected at $2.50 billion, reflecting 123% year-over-year growth. The Chinese EV manufacturer's shares climbed more than 70% year-to-date and 173% over the past twelve months. July 2025 deliveries reached 36,717 vehicles, marking a 229% increase annually and 6.1% monthly growth. The affordable Mona 03 sedan model drove sales acceleration. Twenty-four analysts project an average one-year target of $24.31, implying approximately 23% upside from the $19.70 price point. The earnings report offered critical insights into margin progression and XPeng's competitive positioning within China's intensely competitive electric vehicle sector.
